## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Scope
- Components touched:
- Any out-of-scope items explicitly deferred:

## PR Title
- Conventional Commit format: `type(scope): summary`
- Max length: 70 chars
- Chosen title:

## Testing
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` (or explain why skipped)
- Additional manual checks performed:

## Release Impact
- Semantic intent: `feat` / `fix` / `refactor` / `docs` / `test` / `chore`
- Expected version impact: `major` / `minor` / `patch` / `none`
- Any required env/secret/config changes:

## Operational Notes
- Migration or rollout steps:
- Monitoring/rollback notes:

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] PR title is 70 chars or fewer
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavioral changes
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing or operational changes
- [ ] No sensitive data or local-only artifacts included
